creator: roelof@nisser.com
text:
in /usr/ports/www/apache13-php3 perform a 'make install'. An UI will
popup allowing you to select options. When pressing down-arrow past
the last option the UI will be left and processing will begin.

Fix: 

Work around is not to press down-arrow when at final option
How-To-Repeat: 
	

See Description
